subcodes.title: Words to some Greek passengers, spoken on 1912-10-26
subcodes.first_line: God does not want war. These wars are against the divine will. He desires peace and love for His servants.
subcodes.first_line_orig: خدا حرب نخواسته این نزاعها مخالف رضای الهیست او بجهت بندگانش صلح و صفا خواسته
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @war and peace, @unity; oneness of humanity, @light and darkness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
